Homebrew Formulae

mpd

Install command:

Music Player Daemon

https://www.musicpd.org/

License: GPL-2.0-or-later

Development: Pull requests

Formula JSON API: /api/formula/mpd.json

Formula code: mpd.rb on GitHub

Bottle (binary package) installation support provided for:

macOS on
Apple Silicon		 tahoe ✅
sequoia ✅
sonoma ✅
macOS on
Intel		 sonoma ✅
Linux ARM64 ✅
x86_64 ✅

Current versions:

stable ✅ 0.24.12
head ⚡️ HEAD

Depends on:

chromaprint 1.6.0 Core component of the AcoustID project (Audio fingerprinting)
faad2 2.11.2 ISO AAC audio decoder
ffmpeg 8.1.2 Play, record, convert, and stream select audio and video codecs
flac 1.5.0 Free lossless audio codec
fluid-synth 2.5.5 Real-time software synthesizer based on the SoundFont 2 specs
fmt 12.2.0 Open-source formatting library for C++
game-music-emu 0.6.5 Videogame music file emulator collection
icu4c@78 78.3 C/C++ and Java libraries for Unicode and globalization
lame 3.100 High quality MPEG Audio Layer III (MP3) encoder
libao 1.2.2 Cross-platform Audio Library
libid3tag 0.16.4 ID3 tag manipulation library
libmikmod 3.3.13 Portable sound library
libmpdclient 2.25 Library for MPD in the C, C++, and Objective-C languages
libnfs 6.0.2 C client library for NFS
libnpupnp 6.3.0 C++ base UPnP library, derived from Portable UPnP, a.k.a libupnp
libogg 1.3.6 Ogg Bitstream Library
libsamplerate 0.2.2 Library for sample rate conversion of audio data
libshout 2.4.6 Data and connectivity library for the Icecast server
libsndfile 1.2.2 C library for files containing sampled sound
libsoxr 0.1.3 High quality, one-dimensional sample-rate conversion library
libvorbis 1.3.7 Vorbis general audio compression codec
mpg123 1.33.6 MP3 player for Linux and UNIX
opus 1.6.1 Audio codec
pcre2 10.47 Perl compatible regular expressions library with a new API
sqlite 3.53.2 Command-line interface for SQLite
wavpack 5.9.0 Hybrid lossless audio compression

Depends on when building from source:

meson 1.11.1 Fast and user friendly build system
ninja 1.13.2 Small build system for use with gyp or CMake
nlohmann-json 3.12.0 JSON for modern C++
pkgconf 2.5.1 Package compiler and linker metadata toolkit
MPD requires a config file to start.
Please copy it from $HOMEBREW_PREFIX/etc/mpd/mpd.conf into one of these paths:
    - ~/.mpd/mpd.conf
    - ~/.mpdconf
and tailor it to your needs.
